/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/Initialise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/MHD_flux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/SavingRoutine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mhd_solver.dir/src/StateVector.cpp.o -o mhd_solver  math/libmath_module.a
